div.p: This value set expansion contains 16 concepts.

td.a: Client's age is less than 3 years-40

tr.td: Client's age is less than 3 years

td.a: Client is not due for TBE vaccination-48

tr.td: Client is not due for TBE vaccination

td.a: No TBE primary series doses were administered-112

tr.td: No TBE primary series doses were administered

div.p: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 0

td.a: Client's age is more than or equal to 3 years-40

tr.td: Client's age is more than or equal to 3 years

td.a: Client is due for TBE vaccination-44

tr.td: Client is due for TBE vaccination

td.a: One TBE primary series dose was administered-112

tr.td: One TBE primary series dose was administered

div.p: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1

td.a: The latest TBE dose was administered less than 5 months ago-96

tr.td: The latest TBE dose was administered less than 5 months ago

div.p: Today's date − "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") < 5 months

td.a: The latest TBE dose was administered more than 5 months ago-96

tr.td: The latest TBE dose was administered more than 5 months ago

div.p: Today's date − "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") ≥ 5 months

td.a: Two TBE primary series doses were administered-112

tr.td: Two TBE primary series doses were administered

div.p: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2

td.a: The latest TBE dose was administered less than 12 months ago-104

tr.td: The latest TBE dose was administered less than 12 months ago

div.p: Today's date − latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") < 12 months

td.a: The latest TBE dose was administered more than 12 months ago-97

tr.td: The latest TBE dose was administered more than 12 months ago

div.p: Today's date − "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") ≥ 12 months

td.a: Three TBE primary series doses were administered-112

tr.td: Three TBE primary series doses were administered

div.p: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 3

td.a: The latest TBE dose was administered less than 3 years ago-102

tr.td: The latest TBE dose was administered less than 3 years ago

div.p: Today's date − latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") < 3 years

td.a: Primary series is complete. Client is not due for TBE booster dose-138

tr.td: Primary series is complete. Client is not due for TBE booster dose

div.p: "Immunization recommendation status" = "Not due" "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines")

td.a: The latest TBE dose was administered more than 3 years ago-95

tr.td: The latest TBE dose was administered more than 3 years ago

div.p: Today's date − "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") ≥ 3 years

td.a: Primary series is complete. Client is due for TBE booster dose-134

tr.td: Primary series is complete. Client is due for TBE booster dose

div.p: "Immunization recommendation status" = "Due" "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines")

description.value: ValueSet IMMZD2DTTBEEnceVir for IMMZ.D2.DT.TBE.EnceVir. Business rule: Determine if the client is due for a tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) vaccination according to the national immunization schedule Trigger: IMMZ.D2 Determine required vaccination(s) if any Table: EnceVir schedule (In areas where the disease is highly endemic, implying that there is a high individual risk of infection, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children )

display.value: Client's age is less than 3 years
